name: Disabled Access Credit

eligibility.description: Small businesses with gross receipts under $1,000,000 or fewer than 30 full-time employees in the preceding year. Covers expenses between $250 and $10,250 (max credit $5,000).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A nonrefundable tax credit for 50% of eligible expenditures made by a small business to comply with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA).
